title: festuca ovina var. aurata
intro: Festuca ovina var. aurata, also known as golden sheeps fescue, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, and is said to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing blood sugar levels, improving digestion, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues. Festuca ovina var. aurata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
